title: Evangelion XR Game 2026
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion XR Game [2026]             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Feb 21, 2025 4:06 pm Korea-based VR development studio Pixelity Inc. announced on Friday an XR (extended reality) game based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion franchise scheduled for release in 2026. The company is planning a trilogy of games based on all 26 episodes of the original television anime.

[]: Re: Evangelion XR Game [2026]             Quote Post by DTGee » Fri Feb 21, 2025 5:12 pm I'd certainly be interested in playing it if it miraculously gets an English release.

[]: Re: Evangelion XR Game [2026]             Quote Post by DTGee » Wed Dec 03, 2025 4:27 pm It's been announced that in-person focus group tests will take place in Tokyo and California on December 19th. This basically confirms that this will be the first Evangelion game released outside Japan. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) We also have our first look of what the game will look like.

The company is planning a trilogy of games based on all 26 episodes of the original television anime.
